incident_summary.title: Cascading Failures in E-Commerce Checkout Flow Due to Configuration Changes and Service Degradations
incident_summary.start_time: Not explicitly provided, but inferred to be recent based on active alerts and recent ConfigMap changes
incident_summary.end_time: Incident still active based on provided context
incident_summary.impact: Complete degradation of the checkout flow, resulting in high latency and error rates across multiple services (frontend, frontend-proxy, checkout, recommendation). Users unable to complete orders.
root_causes: Configuration change in `flagd-config` ConfigMap activating `loadgeneratorfloodhomepage` and `cartfailure` flags
Extreme latency in `currency` service's `Currency/Convert` operation due to resource exhaustion in `currency-68d8484df8-c2rsg` pod
Extreme latency in `email` service's `POST /send_order_confirmation` and `send_email` operations due to intrinsic issues in `email-64ddb8d8d7-75kb8` pod
Intrinsic failures in `checkout` service (gRPC 13 errors) due to degraded `checkout-8546fdc74d-d68cn` pod

contributing_factors.name: flagd-config (ConfigMap)
contributing_factors.description: Configuration change activated `loadgeneratorfloodhomepage` (flooding frontend with requests) and `cartfailure` (failing cart service) flags, triggering the incident.

contributing_factors.name: service/flagd
contributing_factors.description: Propagated the misconfigured flags from `flagd-config` to dependent services (`cart`, `load-generator`).

contributing_factors.name: currency-68d8484df8-c2rsg (Pod)
contributing_factors.description: Resource exhaustion and instability causing extreme latency in `currency` service's `Currency/Convert` operation.

contributing_factors.name: currency (Service)
contributing_factors.description: Extreme latency in `Currency/Convert` operation due to pod-level issues, cascading failures to upstream services.

contributing_factors.name: email-64ddb8d8d7-75kb8 (Pod)
contributing_factors.description: Intrinsic latency in `POST /send_order_confirmation` and `send_email` operations, exacerbating checkout flow degradation.

contributing_factors.name: email (Service)
contributing_factors.description: Extreme internal latency in email operations, contributing to overall checkout flow degradation.

contributing_factors.name: checkout-8546fdc74d-d68cn (Pod)
contributing_factors.description: Intrinsic failures (gRPC 13 errors) in `checkout` service, not solely attributable to downstream dependencies.

contributing_factors.name: checkout (Service)
contributing_factors.description: High error rate (95.5%) and extreme latency (8172ms) due to intrinsic failures and downstream dependencies.

contributing_factors.name: service/cart
contributing_factors.description: Failure induced by `cartfailure` flag in `flagd-config`, impacting `checkout` service's ability to process orders.

propagations.condition: Modification of `flagd-config` ConfigMap to activate `loadgeneratorfloodhomepage` and `cartfailure` flags.
propagations.effect: `service/flagd` propagates the misconfigured flags to dependent services.
`service/cart` begins failing, impacting `checkout` service's ability to process orders.

propagations.condition: `loadgeneratorfloodhomepage` flag enabled in `flagd-config` ConfigMap, setting `defaultvariant` to `100`.
propagations.effect: `load-generator` floods `frontend` with maximum request volume, causing resource saturation and latency spikes.

propagations.condition: Extreme request volume from `load-generator` due to `loadgeneratorfloodhomepage` flag activation.
propagations.effect: `frontend-proxy` experiences high latency (15,000s) and triggers `RequestLatency` alert.

propagations.condition: Cascading latency and resource saturation from `load-generator` flood.
propagations.effect: `frontend` service experiences high latency and triggers `RequestLatency` alert. Error rate increases (1.73 errors), triggering `RequestErrorRate` alert.

propagations.condition: High request volume and latency from `frontend` propagate to `checkout` service.
propagations.effect: `checkout` service experiences extreme latency (8172ms) and high error rate (95.5%), triggering `RequestLatency` and `RequestErrorRate` alerts.

propagations.condition: `cart` service failure due to `cartfailure` flag activation.
propagations.effect: `checkout` service unable to retrieve cart data, exacerbating intrinsic failures (gRPC 13 errors).

propagations.condition: Resource exhaustion and instability in `currency-68d8484df8-c2rsg` pod.
propagations.effect: `currency` service's `Currency/Convert` operation experiences extreme latency (10,393,625.28ms and 17,270,485.73ms).
`checkout` service experiences cascading timeouts and failures, exacerbating gRPC 13 errors.
`email` service experiences extreme latency in `POST /send_order_confirmation` (213,644.24ms) and `send_email` (113,467.37ms) operations.
`checkout` service waits for `email` to complete, further increasing latency and error rates.

propagations.condition: Intrinsic failures (gRPC 13 errors) and extreme latency in `checkout` service.
propagations.effect: `frontend` service reports errors such as 'shipping quote failure' and 'failed to prepare order', increasing error rate.

propagations.condition: High request volume and latency from `frontend` propagate to `recommendation` service.
propagations.effect: `recommendation` service experiences latency and triggers `RequestLatency` alert.
